name: K0rp_OS UI Asset Pack v0.1
rendering: RGBA PNG, no antialiasing in geometry, nearest-neighbor scaling
rules: Shared structural frame; semantic meaning lives in accent strip, surface material and document state.
Audits and forms are paper artifacts, not generic game dialogs.
Authorization precedes installation; installation creates visible desktop artifacts.
Memos are files in Doručené, not routine blocking popups.
Color is never the only state signal; glyph, border and copy also change.
The hidden meta layer remains atmospheric and is never represented as an explicit lore control.
Pixel Operator / Pixel Operator Mono are the runtime font direction; font files are not included.
